title: The physics behind Flow Matching models
summary: Julia Turc provides an in-depth technical analysis of the Flow Matching training algorithm, covering time-variant probability densities, velocity fields, continuous normalizing flows, and optimal transport theory. The video explains how Flow Matching unifies concurrent work including Rectified Flow and Stochastic Interpolants, with particular focus on velocity field learning and the physics principles underlying the method.
